title: User Guides - Onboarding > Fit test for a device that is not currently connected
scenario: Fit Test page should not be displayed or accessible during onboarding when the device is not connected
steps: Navigate to the onboarding user guides section.
Select a device that is not currently connected.
Observe the list of onboarding screens presented.
Check if the Fit Test page appears in the onboarding screens.
Attempt to start a fit test for the disconnected device.
expected: The Fit Test page should not be displayed as part of the onboarding screens for a device that is not connected. Starting a fit test for a device that is not connected should not be possible.
